items.name: All target Story design evidence exists and is ready for review
items.notes: S01-S04 are full-lld; S05 is technical-note in the Story card.

items.name: Design evidence maps to CP3-approved HLD / ADR and Feature Matrix
items.notes: PIT/label, purged CV, metadata, ML gate adapter and evidence wording are covered.

items.name: Known CP5 focus items are resolved or routed
items.notes: Active triple_barrier is BLOCKED in first wave; S04 records inline-fallback for CP5 evidence and requires design reopen/meta-se dispatch if implementation finds ambiguity.

items.name: CP5 approval would authorize local static fixture implementation only
items.notes: Real training, real data validation, registry/store/catalog writes, runtime, lake/NAS/provider/broker/credential/external framework/Git remote remain unauthorized.

items.name: Manual checkpoint draft and launch message are generated
items.notes: Human gate is pending user approve / modification / reject.

pending_human_decisions.question: Confirm CR152 S01-S04 full LLDs and S05 technical-note as implementation inputs?
pending_human_decisions.recommended_option: Approve the full CP5 design evidence batch and proceed only to local/static/fixture implementation after approval.

pending_human_decisions.question: Accept CR152 implementation sequencing and file ownership?
pending_human_decisions.recommended_option: Accept S01 -> S02 -> S03 -> S04 -> S05 sequencing; keep shared files serialized by merge owner.

pending_human_decisions.question: Accept exact first-wave enforcement for active triple_barrier / meta_label methods?
pending_human_decisions.recommended_option: Return BLOCKED when triple_barrier or meta_label is active in first wave because algorithms are reserved but not implemented.

pending_human_decisions.question: Keep CP5 approval limited to local/static/fixture source implementation and tests?
pending_human_decisions.recommended_option: Do not authorize real training, real data validation, registry/store/catalog writes, lake/NAS/provider/QMT/runtime/broker/credential/external framework/Git remote operations.
